title: Greeley Daily Tribune — July 9, 1932 (Page 3)
author: Greeley Daily Tribune
card_summary: A clipped page from the Greeley Daily Tribune (Greeley, Colorado), dated Saturday, July 9, 1932, page 3. Philip K. Dick was approximately four years old in 1932; this clipping is likely related to his early family history or the Dick family's connection to Greeley, Colorado.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Greeley Daily Tribune (Greeley, Colorado), dated Saturday, July 9, 1932, page 3. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com, clipped by researcher pwshelton8296 on April 9, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

Philip K. Dick was born on December 16, 1928, making him approximately three and a half years old at the time of this newspaper's publication. Dick's parents, Joseph Edgar Dick and Dorothy Kindred Dick, had separated when Philip and his twin sister Jane were infants. Jane died at five weeks of age in January 1929. The Greeley, Colorado connection suggests this clipping may relate to the Dick family's history in the region, possibly documenting family members or events from Dick's earliest childhood. Greeley is in Weld County, northeastern Colorado.
